# setup: af setup initialises the user-scope environment in a hermetic
# HOME (ADR-045): state dirs, default config, global gitignore entry,
# and shell completions.
#
# A script-local git fake answers the two `git config --global` calls
# setup makes: `--get core.excludesfile` exits 1 (unset), so setup
# adopts its default path $HOME/.config/git/ignore, and the follow-up
# set call succeeds silently.
#
# Scenarios:
#   1. first run creates everything.
#   2. rerun is idempotent (config kept, gitignore unchanged).
#   3. unsupported --shell value — hard error.

env HOME=$WORK/home
mkdir $WORK/home

chmod 755 mygit/git
env PATH=$WORK/mygit:$PATH

# ── Scenario 1: first run ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
exec af setup --shell bash
stdout 'af setup complete:'
stdout 'state dir:'
stdout '\(created\)'
stdout 'entry added'
stdout 'bash installed at'

# State directory tree per ADR-045.
exists $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/sessions
exists $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/archive
exists $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/secrets

# Default user config.
exists $HOME/.config/af/config.toml

# Global gitignore got the .af/ entry.
exists $HOME/.config/git/ignore
grep '\.af/' $HOME/.config/git/ignore

# Bash completions installed.
exists $HOME/.local/share/bash-completion/completions/af

# ── Scenario 2: rerun is idempotent ───────────────────────────────────────────
exec af setup --shell bash
stdout 'af setup complete:'
stdout '\(already exists\)'
stdout 'no change'

# The gitignore entry must not be duplicated.
exec grep -c '^\.af/$' $HOME/.config/git/ignore
stdout '^1$'

# ── Scenario 3: unsupported shell ─────────────────────────────────────────────
! exec af setup --shell klingon
stderr 'unsupported shell: klingon'

# ── Fakes ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- mygit/git --
#!/bin/sh
# Fake git for af setup: reports core.excludesfile as unset (exit 1 on
# `config --global --get`), accepts the subsequent set call, and
# succeeds silently on anything else.
if [ "$1" = "config" ] && [ "$2" = "--global" ] && [ "$3" = "--get" ]; then
  exit 1
fi
exit 0
